questions.questionText: Provide details of your organization's internal price on carbon.
questions.questionKo: 귀사의 내부 탄소가격에 대한 세부정보를 입력하십시오 .
questions.searchText: 5.10.1 provide details of your organization's internal price on carbon. business strategy matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 귀사의 내부 탄소가격에 대한 세부정보를 입력하십시오 . m5. business strategy revised question dependency the question only appears if you select "yes" in response to column 2 "use of internal pricing for this environmental externality" in the row "water" of 5.10. 5.10.1.1 type of pricing scheme single_select shadow price internal fee internal trading implicit price other, please specify 5.10.1.10 minimum actual price used (currency per metric ton co2e) numeric 5.10.1.11 maximum actual price used (currency per metric ton co2e) numeric 5.10.1.12 business decision-making processes the internal price is applied to multi_select capital expenditure dependencies management impact management operations procurement product and r&d remuneration risk management opportunity management value chain engagement public policy engagement other, please specify 5.10.1.13 internal price is mandatory within business decision-making processes single_select yes, for all decision-making processes yes, for some decision-making processes, please specify no 5.10.1.14 % total emissions in the reporting year in selected scopes this internal price covers numeric 5.10.1.15 pricing approach is monitored and evaluated to achieve objectives single_select yes no 5.10.1.16 details of how the pricing approach is monitored and evaluated to achieve your objectives rich_text 5.10.1.2 objectives for implementing internal price multi_select conduct cost-benefit analysis drive energy efficiency drive low-carbon investment incentivize consideration of climate-related issues in decision making incentivize consideration of climate-related issues in risk assessment identify and evaluate financing opportunities identify and seize low-carbon opportunities influence strategy and/or financial planning navigate regulations reduce upstream value chain emissions setting and/or achieving of climate-related policies and targets set a carbon offset budget stress test investments inform credit risk assessments for existing loans or credit lines inform credit risk assessments for new loans inform credit risk assessments for renewals of terms for existing loans use an internal price for corporate engagement/stewardship purposes other, please specify 5.10.1.3 factors considered when determining the price multi_select alignment to international standards alignment to scientific guidance alignment with the price of a carbon tax alignment with the price of allowances under an emissions trading scheme alignment with the price of carbon border adjustment mechanism benchmarking against peers cost of required measures to achieve climate-related targets existing or pending legislation price with substantive impact on business decisions price/cost of renewable energy procurement price/cost of voluntary carbon offset credits scenario analysis social cost of climate-related impact other, please specify 5.10.1.4 calculation methodology and assumptions made in determining the price rich_text 5.10.1.5 scopes covered multi_select scope 1 scope 2 scope 3, category 1 - purchased goods and services scope 3, category 2 - capital goods scope 3, category 3 - fuel- and energy-related activities (not included in scope 1 or 2) scope 3, category 4 - upstream transportation and distribution scope 3, category 5 - waste generated in operations scope 3, category 6 - business travel scope 3, category 7 - employee commuting scope 3, category 8 - upstream leased assets scope 3, category 9 - downstream transportation and distribution scope 3, category 10 - processing of sold products scope 3, category 11 - use of sold products scope 3, category 12 - end-of-life treatment of sold products scope 3, category 13 - downstream leased assets scope 3, category 14 - franchises scope 3, category 15 - investments scope 3, other (upstream) scope 3, other (downstream) 5.10.1.6 pricing approach used - spatial variance single_select differentiated uniform other, please specify 5.10.1.7 indicate how and why the price is differentiated rich_text 5.10.1.8 pricing approach used - temporal variance single_select evolutionary static other, please specify 5.10.1.9 indicate how you expect the price to change over time rich_text change from last year revised question dependency question dependencies the question only appears if you select "yes" in response to column 2 "use of internal pricing for this environmental externality" in the row "carbon" of 5.10. requested content general if your organization uses more than one type of internal carbon price, add a row to provide details for each type. type of internal carbon price (column 1) shadow price: where a hypothetical cost of carbon is attached to each ton of co2e to reveal hidden risks and opportunities throughout the organization's operations and value chain and to support strategic decision-making related to future capital investments. a shadow price can be used in investment decisions or to set budgets, but... ambition the organization applies internal environmental pricing to incentivize the consideration of environmental issues in risk assessment and decision making, and in the implementation of its environmental policies and targets. the organization discloses the internal price in units of the organization's reporting currency per metric ton co2e. the organization epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 환경이슈와 관련하여 귀사의 가치사슬에 대한 인게이지먼트 활동을 하고 있습니까 ? minor change guidance added to specify engagement should be in reporting year. dropdown option added for ocean. 5.11.1 engaging with this stakeholder on environmental issues single_select yes no, but we plan to within the next two years no, and we do not plan to within the next two years 5.11.2 environmental issues covered multi_select climate change water 5.11.3 primary reason for not engaging with this stakeholder on environmental issues single_select lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size) no standardized procedure not an immediate strategic priority judged to be unimportant or not relevant other, please specify 5.11.4 explain why you do not engage with this stakeholder on environmental issues rich_text change from last year no change; new question for ocean question dependencies your response to this question will determine which subsequent questions and response options within subsequent questions are presented. if your response to 5.11 is amended, data in those dependent questions may be erased. requested content general "other value chain stakeholders" can include but is not limited to, community organizations, non-governmental organizations, river basin organizations, government agencies, and employees. report only the value chain engagement activities that took place during the reporting year, or those spanning multiple years that include the reporting year. this applies to all questions in the value chain engagement section. engaging with this stakeholder on environmental issues (column 1) select ... ambition the organization has a value chain engagement strategy for environmental issues and undertakes value chain engagement to positively affect its value chain stakeholders and the environment. explanation of terms customer: an entity that purchases or acquires the products of another entity (i.e., a supplier). a customer may be a business customer or an end consumer ( ghg protocol, 2013 ). smallholder: small-scale agricultural or forest products producers that are distinct from larger-scale producers found issues. explanation of terms basin/landscape condition: the state of an area, such as a river basin or landscape, measured by its abiotic (non-living) and biotic (living) characteristics, including questions.questionText: Does your organization prioritize which suppliers to engage with on environmental issues?
questions.questionKo: 귀사는 환경이슈와 관련하여 인게이지먼트 할 공급업체의 우선순위를 정하여 관리하고 있습니까 ?
questions.changeStatus: No change; new question for Ocean; detail changes
questions.searchText: 5.11.2 does your organization prioritize which suppliers to engage with on environmental issues? business strategy matrix oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 귀사는 환경이슈와 관련하여 인게이지먼트 할 공급업체의 우선순위를 정하여 관리하고 있습니까 ? m5. business strategy no change; new question for ocean; detail changes new row added for 'ocean'. dropdown option 'vulnerability of suppliers' replaced with 'suppliers' exposure or vulnerability to physical risks'. 5.11.2.1 supplier engagement prioritization on this environmental issue single_select yes, we prioritize which suppliers to engage with on this environmental issue no, we do not prioritize which suppliers to engage with on this environmental issue 5.11.2.2 criteria informing which suppliers are prioritized for engagement on this environmental issue multi_select in line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to climate change in line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to forests in line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to water in line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to the ocean in line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to plastics business risk mitigation leverage over suppliers material sourcing procurement spend product lifecycle product safety and compliance regulatory compliance reputation management strategic status of suppliers supplier performance improvement suppliers' exposure or vulnerability to physical risks other, please specify 5.11.2.3 primary reason for no supplier prioritization on this environmental issue single_select we engage with all suppliers lack of internal resources, capabilities or expertise (e.g., due to organization size) no standardized procedure not an immediate strategic priority judged to be unimportant or not relevant other, please specify 5.11.2.4 please explain rich_text change from last year no change; new question for ocean question dependencies this question appears if you select "yes" in response to column 1 "engaging with this stakeholder on environmental issues" for the row "suppliers" of 5.11. requested content general this question focuses on tier 1 (direct) suppliers only. criteria informing which suppliers are prioritized for engagement on this environmental issue (column 2) select the criteria that best describe the factors considered when prioritizing suppliers to engage with on each environmental issue. for example, if, following an evaluation of the climate-related risks associated with your organization's material sourcing you focus your engagement on suppliers of the materials critical to m... ambition the organization prioritizes engagement with specific suppliers on environmental issues, guided by their dependencies and/or impact on the environment. explanation of terms compliance: the state of complying with or fulfilling a given environmental requirement, standard, policy, commitment, or target. compliance may be assessed at the level of production or primary processing unit(s) (e.g., farms, farmer groups, or mills), value chains or an entire organization commitment (adapted from afi, 2024 ). vulnerable supplier : supplier that is exposed to significant economic, environmental and/or social risks ( esrs , 2023 ). 귀사는 환경이슈와 관련하여 인게이지먼트 할 공급업체의 우선순위를 정하여 관리하고 있습니까 ? 사업전략 표 형식 응답 수자원, 해양, 플라스틱, climate change, 산림 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 oem - epm, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, questions.searchText: 5.11.3 provide details of your environmental engagement strategy with your clients. business strategy matrix financial services [국문 번역 검토 필요] provide details of your environmental engagement strategy with your clients. minor change new dropdown options added and environmental tags updated so only relevant options appear for each environmental issue. 5.11.3.1 type of clients single_select clients of banks clients of asset managers clients of insurers 5.11.3.10 roles of individuals at the portfolio organizations you seek to engage with multi_select board members board chair ceo corporate secretary investor relations managers other, please specify 5.11.3.11 effect of engagement, including measures of success rich_text 5.11.3.12 escalation process for engagement when dialogue is failing single_select yes, we have an escalation process no, we don't have an escalation process 5.11.3.13 describe your escalation process rich_text 5.11.3.2 environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy multi_select climate change water 5.11.3.3 type and details of engagement grouped_options capacity building | develop or distribute value chain mapping tool capacity building | provide training, support and best practices on how to make credible renewable energy usage claims capacity building | provide training, support and best practices on how to measure ghg emissions capacity building | provide training, support and best practices on how to set science-based targets capacity building | support clients to develop public, time-bound action plans with clear milestones capacity building | support clients to set their own environmental commitments across their operations capacity building | other capacity building activity, please specify financial incentives | provide financial incentives for environmental performance financial incentives | provide financial incentives for progress against water pollution targets financial incentives | provide financial incentives for progress against water withdrawal targets financial incentives | provide financial incentives for progress against forests-related targets financial incentives | provide financial incentives for certified products and services financial incentives | provide financial incentives for clients with a climate transition plan financial incentives | provide financial incentives for clients increasing renewable energy use financial incentives | provide financial incentives for progress against climate-related targets financial incentives | provide financial incentives for the implementation of adaptation plans financial incentives | provide financial incentives for clients with an adaptation plan financial incentives | other financial incentive, please specify information collection | collect climate transition plan information at least annually from clients information collection | collect environmental risk and opportunity information at least annually from clients information collection | collect ghg emissions data at least annually from clients information collection | collect targets information at least annually from clients information collection | collect wash information at least annually from clients information collection | collect water quality information at least annually from clients (e.g., discharge quality, pollution incidents, hazardous substances) information collection | collect water quantity information at least annually from clients (e.g., withdrawal and discharge volumes) information collection | other information collection activity, please specify innovation and collaboration | collaborate with clients on innovations to reduce environmental impacts in products and services innovation and collaboration | collaborate with clients on innovative business models and corporate renewable energy sourcing mechanisms innovation and collaboration | encourage clients to take beyond value chain mitigation (bvcm) actions innovation and collaboration | encourage collaborative work in landscapes or jurisdictions innovation and collaboration | incentivize collaborative sustainable water management in river basins innovation and collaboration | engage with clients to advocate for policy or regulatory change to address environmental challenges innovation and collaboration | facilitate adoption of a unified climate transition approach with clients innovation and collaboration | invest jointly with clients in r&d of relevant low-carbon technologies innovation and collaboration | run a campaign to encourage innovation to reduce environmental impacts on products and services innovation and collaboration | other innovation and collaboration activity, please specify other, please specify | other, please specify 5.11.3.4 % of client-associated scope 3 emissions as reported in question 12.1.1 single_select none less than 1% 1-25% 26-50% 51-75% 76-99% 100% unknown 5.11.3.5 % of portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value single_select none less than 1% 1-25% 26-50% 51-75% 76-99% 100% unknown 5.11.3.6 explain the rationale for the coverage of your engagement rich_text 5.11.3.7 describe how you communicate your engagement strategy to your clients and/or to the public rich_text 5.11.3.8 attach your engagement strategy attachment 5.11.3.9 staff in your organization carrying out the engagement multi_select specialized in-house engagement teams fund managers equity/credit analysts senior-level roles other, please specify change from last year minor change question dependencies this question appears if you select "yes" in response to column 1 "engaging with this stakeholder on environmental issues" for the row "clients" of 5.11. requested content general provide details about your organization's client engagement strategy regarding environmental issues. this question focuses on corporate clients only. add a row for each type of client you are disclosing on. add multiple rows for the same type of client if you wish to provide different engagement details. % of client-related scope 3 emissions as reported in 12.1.1 (column 4) this column only appears if "climate change" is selected in column 2 "environmental issues covered by the engage... ambition financial services companies have client engagement strategies for environmental issues and undertake engagement with clients to positively affect their own performance and the environment. banks and insurers engage with their clients and asset managers engage with both clients and investees. explanation of terms adaptation : in human systems, the process of adjustment to actual or expected climate and its effects, in order to moderate harm or exploit beneficial opportunities. in natural systems, the process of adjustment to actual climate and its effects; human intervention may facilitate adjustment to expected climate and its effects. ( ipcc, 2018 ) climate transition plan: an encompassing instrument that helps organizations to align their climate ambitions. this alignment is achieved by establishin... details of your environmental questions.questionText: Do your suppliers have to meet environmental requirements as part of your organization's purchasing process?
questions.questionKo: 구매 프로세스의 일환으로 , 귀사는 공급업체에게 환경이슈와 관련한 사항을 충족하도록 요구하고 있습니까 ?
questions.reviewStatus: 변경 없음 확인 및 2026 원문 반영
questions.searchText: 5.11.5 do your suppliers have to meet environmental requirements as part of your organization's purchasing process? business strategy matrix oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 구매 프로세스의 일환으로 , 귀사는 공급업체에게 환경이슈와 관련한 사항을 충족하도록 요구하고 있습니까 ? m5. business strategy no change - 2026 source verified 5.11.5.1 suppliers have to meet specific environmental requirements related to this environmental issue as part of the purchasing process single_select yes, environmental requirements related to this environmental issue are included in our supplier contracts yes, suppliers have to meet environmental requirements related to this environmental issue, but they are not included in our supplier contracts no, but we plan to introduce environmental requirements related to this environmental issue within the next two years no, and we do not plan to introduce environmental requirements related to this environmental issue within the next two years 5.11.5.2 policy in place for addressing supplier non-compliance single_select yes, we have a policy in place for addressing non-compliance no, we do not have a policy in place for addressing non-compliance 5.11.5.3 comment rich_text change from last year no change question dependencies this question only appears if you select "yes" in response to column 1 "engaging with this stakeholder on environmental issues" for the row "suppliers" and if "climate" or "water" or "forests" is selected in column 2 "environmental issues covered" in 5.11. requested content general environmental requirements can be either pre-requisites to establishing a purchasing relationship or be specified as metrics to achieve once supplier onboarding is completed. organizations responding to either of the "yes…" options in any row will be further prompted to identify the environmental requirements and provide details of the compliance measures in place in the following question. suppliers have to meet specific environmental requirements related to this environmental issue ... ambition the organization has environmental requirements that all relevant suppliers have to meet as part of their purchasing process. these are included in supplier contracts and the organization has mechanisms for monitoring compliance with these requirements. the organization has clear, consistent, and documented policies and procedures for addressing supplier non-compliance. the organization should, where possible, retain non-compliant suppliers and promote compliance before suspending or excludin... explanation of terms compliance: the state of complying with or fulfilling a given environmental requirement, standard, policy, commitment, or target. compliance may be assessed at the level of production or primary processing unit(s) (e.g., farms, farmer groups, or mills), value chains or an entire organization commitment (adapted from afi, 2024 ). non-compliance: the state of not complying with or fulfilling (or only partially complying with or fulfilling) a given environmental requirement, standard, commitment... 구매 프로세스의 일환으로 , 귀사는 공급업체에게 환경이슈와 관련한 사항을 충족하도록 questions.questionText: Provide details of the environmental requirements that suppliers have to meet as part of your organization's purchasing process, and the compliance measures in place.
questions.questionKo: 구매 프로세스의 일환으로 , 귀사의 공급업체가 충족해야 하는 환경 요구사항과 규정 준수 사항에 대한 세부 정보를 입력하십시오 .
questions.searchText: 5.11.6 provide details of the environmental requirements that suppliers have to meet as part of your organization's purchasing process, and the compliance measures in place. an environmental certification, please specify disclosure of ghg emissions to your organization (scope 1 and 2) disclosure of ghg emissions to your organization (scope 1, 2 and 3) environmental disclosure through a non-public platform environmental disclosure through a public platform implementation of a climate transition plan implementation of emissions reduction initiatives measuring product-level emissions monitoring and reduction of product carbon footprint (pcf)/ product life-cycle emissions no deforestation or conversion of other natural ecosystems no development on peat regardless of depth provision of fully-functioning, safely managed wash services to all employees purchasing of low-carbon or renewable energy regular environmental risk assessments (at least once annually) reporting against a sustainability index (e.g., djsi, cdp etc.) secure free, prior and informed consent (fpic) of indigenous peoples and local communities setting a low-carbon or renewable energy target setting a no deforestation or conversion of other natural ecosystems commitment across entire commodity business setting a science-based emissions reduction target setting a science-based forest, land and agriculture (flag) target setting and monitoring water pollution-related targets setting and monitoring withdrawal reduction targets substitution of hazardous substances with less harmful substances total water withdrawal volumes reduction waste and resource reduction and material circularity other, please specify 5.11.6.10 % of non-compliant suppliers engaged percentage of suppliers you have confirmed are compliant with the requirement. environmental requirement (column 2) select the option that best describes the environmental requirement that suppliers questions.questionText: Provide further details of your organization's supplier engagement on environmental issues.
questions.questionKo: 귀사의 환경이슈 관련 공급망 인게이지먼트 활동을 자세하게 입력하십시오 .
questions.changeStatus: Minor change; new question for Ocean
questions.searchText: 5.11.7 provide further details of your organization's supplier engagement on environmental issues. business strategy matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 귀사의 환경이슈 관련 공급망 인게이지먼트 활동을 자세하게 입력하십시오 . m5. business strategy minor change; new question for ocean new row added for 'ocean'. new dropdown options added and environmental tags updated so only relevant options appear for each environmental issue. guidance added to clarify what data is being requested. conditional logic updated - column now appears to all disclosers and guidance updated to reflect this. 5.11.7.10 engagement is helping your tier 1 suppliers meet an environmental requirement related to this environmental issue single_select yes, please specify the environmental requirement no, this engagement is unrelated to meeting an environmental requirement 5.11.7.11 engagement is helping your tier 1 suppliers engage with their own suppliers on the selected action single_select yes no unknown 5.11.7.2 action driven by supplier engagement single_select no other supplier engagement adaptation to climate change adoption of the united nation's international labour organization principles avoid and reduce overexploitation of marine wildlife carbon removals circular economy emissions reduction macro and microplastic leakage reduction no deforestation and/or conversion of other natural ecosystems provision of fully-functioning, safely managed wash services to all employees reduce risks to threatened and protected species removal of plastic from the environment remediation of converted or damaged natural ecosystems natural ecosystem restoration and long-term protection secure free, prior and informed consent (fpic) of indigenous peoples and local communities substitution of hazardous substances with less harmful substances upstream value chain transparency and human rights total water withdrawal volumes reduction waste and resource reduction and improved end-of-life management other, please specify 5.11.7.3 type and details of engagement grouped_options capacity building | develop or distribute resources on how to map upstream value chain capacity building | provide training, support and best practices on how to make credible renewable energy usage claims capacity building | provide training, support and best practices on how to measure ghg emissions capacity building | provide training, support and best practices on how to mitigate environmental impact capacity building | provide training, support and best practices on how to set science-based targets capacity building | provide training and support for adaptation activities capacity building | support suppliers to develop public time-bound action plans with clear milestones capacity building | support suppliers to set their own environmental commitments across their operations capacity building | other capacity building activity, please specify financial incentives | feature environmental performance in supplier awards scheme financial incentives | provide financial incentives to encourage progress against wash targets financial incentives | provide financial incentives to encourage progress against water pollution targets financial incentives | provide financial incentives to encourage progress against water withdrawal targets financial incentives | include long-term contracts linked to environmental commitments financial incentives | offer purchase guarantee linked to best agricultural practices financial incentives | pay higher prices linked to best agricultural practices financial incentives | provide financial incentives for adopting climate-resilient practices financial incentives | provide financial incentives for certified products financial incentives | provide financial incentives for environmental performance financial incentives | provide financial incentives for suppliers with a climate transition plan financial incentives | provide financial incentives for suppliers increasing renewable energy use financial incentives | other financial incentive, please specify information collection | collect climate transition plan information at least annually from suppliers information collection | collect environmental risk and opportunity information at least annually from suppliers information collection | collect ghg emissions data at least annually from suppliers information collection | collect targets information at least annually from suppliers information collection | collect wash information at least annually from suppliers information collection | collect water quality information at least annually from suppliers (e.g., discharge quality, pollution incidents, hazardous substances) information collection | collect water quantity information at least annually from suppliers (e.g., withdrawal and discharge volumes) information collection | other information collection activity, please specify innovation and collaboration | collaborate with suppliers on innovations to reduce environmental impacts in products and services innovation and collaboration | collaborate with suppliers on innovative business models and corporate renewable energy sourcing mechanisms innovation and collaboration | collaborate with suppliers to develop reuse infrastructure and reuse models innovation and collaboration | encourage suppliers to take beyond value chain mitigation (bvcm) actions innovation and collaboration | encourage collaborative work in landscapes or jurisdictions innovation and collaboration | incentivize collaborative sustainable water management in river basins innovation and collaboration | engage with suppliers to advocate for policy or regulatory change to address environmental challenges innovation and collaboration | facilitate adoption of a unified climate transition approach with suppliers innovation and collaboration | invest jointly with suppliers in r&d of relevant low-carbon technologies innovation and collaboration | run a campaign to encourage innovation to reduce environmental impacts on products and questions.questionText: Provide details of any environmental engagement activity with other stakeholders in the value chain.
questions.questionKo: 귀사의 환경이슈 관련하여 가치사슬 내 기타 이해관계자들과의 인게이지먼트 활동을 자세하게 입력하십시오
questions.searchText: 5.11.9 provide details of any environmental engagement activity with other stakeholders in the value chain. business strategy matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 귀사의 환경이슈 관련하여 가치사슬 내 기타 이해관계자들과의 인게이지먼트 활동을 자세하게 입력하십시오 m5. business strategy minor change new dropdown option 'collaborate with stakeholders to adapt to the impacts of climate change [cfw]' added. 5.11.9.1 type of stakeholder single_select customers investors and shareholders other value chain stakeholder, please specify 5.11.9.2 type and details of engagement grouped_options education/information sharing | educate and work with stakeholders on understanding and measuring exposure to environmental risks education/information sharing | run an engagement campaign to educate stakeholders about the environmental impacts about your products, goods and/or services education/information sharing | share information about your products and relevant certification schemes education/information sharing | share information on environmental initiatives, progress and achievements education/information sharing | other education/information sharing, please specify innovation and collaboration | align your organization's goals to support customers' targets and ambitions innovation and collaboration | collaborate with stakeholders in creation and review of your climate transition plan innovation and collaboration | collaborate with stakeholders on innovations to reduce environmental impacts in products and services innovation and collaboration | collaborate with stakeholders on implementing adaptation activities innovation and collaboration | encourage collaborative work in multi-stakeholder landscape towards initiatives for sustainable land-use goals innovation and collaboration | engage with stakeholders to advocate for policy or regulatory change innovation and collaboration | incentivize collaborative sustainable water management in river basins innovation and collaboration | run a campaign to encourage innovation to reduce environmental impacts innovation and collaboration | other innovation and collaboration, please specify other | other, please specify 5.11.9.3 % of stakeholder type engaged single_select none less than 1% 1-25% 26-50% 51-75% 76-99% 100% unknown 5.11.9.4 % stakeholder-associated scope 3 emissions single_select none less than 1% 1-25% 26-50% 51-75% 76-99% 100% unknown 5.11.9.5 rationale for engaging these stakeholders and scope of engagement rich_text 5.11.9.6 effect of engagement and measures of success rich_text change from last year minor change question dependencies this question only appears if you select "yes" in response to column 1 "engaging with this stakeholder on environmental issues" for the rows "customers", "investors and shareholders" or "other value chain stakeholders" of 5.11. requested content type of stakeholder (column 2) if your organization engages with more than one type of value chain stakeholder per environmental issue, or you wish to report multiple stakeholder types not listed using "other value chain stakeholder, please specify", add rows as needed. note that subsequent columns refer to the stakeholder specified in this column. for example, if you select "investors and shareholders" in this column, the percentage provided in column 4 "% of stakeholder type engaged" pertai... ambition the organization has a value chain engagement strategy for environmental issues and undertakes value chain engagement to positively affect its value chain stakeholders and the environment. the organization sets quantitative measures of success to evaluate the effect of its engagement. explanation of terms adaptation : in human systems , the process of adjustment to actual or expected climate and its effects, in order to moderate harm or exploit beneficial opportunities. in natural systems, the process of adjustment to actual climate and its effects; human intervention may facilitate adjustment to expected climate and its effects ( ipcc, 2018 ). climate transition plan: an encompassing 혹은 이전의 구조적 변화가 이번 배출량 공개에 반영되어 있습니까 ? m7. environmental performance - climate change 구조적 변화 여부 인수 , 매각 또는 합병한 조직 이름 완료 날짜를 포함한 구조적 변경 사항의 세부 정보 해당 사항 모두 선택 예 , 인수 예 , 매각 예 , 합병 예 , 기타 구조 변경 , 직접입력 아니요 최대 500 자 작성 최대 2,500 자 작성 no change - 2026 source verified 7.1.1.1 has there been a structural change? multi_select yes, an acquisition yes, a divestment yes, a merger yes, other structural change, please specify no 7.1.1.2 name of organization(s) acquired, divested from, or merged with rich_text 7.1.1.3 details of structural change(s), including completion dates rich_text change from last year no change question dependencies this question only appears if you select "no" in response to 7.1. requested content general consider structural changes (including minor ones) which: occurred during the reporting year and are being accounted for in this disclosure (e.g., you acquired a company during the reporting year and are including the acquired company's emissions data in this cdp response). occurred prior to the reporting year but are being accounted for in this disclosure (e.g., you acquired a company during the previous reporting year but excluded the acquired company from your cdp response in the p... explanation of terms structural changes: structural changes include mergers, acquisitions, divestments, and outsourcing/insourcing of emitting activities (refer to chapter 5 of the ghg protocol corporate standard for more information). 보고 연도에 조직에 구조적 변화가 있었습니까 ? questions.questionText: Has your emissions accounting methodology, boundary, and/or reporting year definition changed in the reporting year?
questions.questionKo: 보고연도 기간 중, 배출량 산정방법론, 조직 경계 및/또는 보고연도에 대한 정의가 변경되었습니까?
questions.searchText: 7.1.2 has your emissions accounting methodology, boundary, and/or reporting year definition changed in the reporting year? environmental performance - climate change matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 보고 연도에 배출량 회계 방법론 , 경계 및 / 또는 보고 연도 정의가 변경되었습니까 ? m7. environmental performance - climate change 방법론 , 경계 및 / 또는 보고 연도 정의에 변경 사항이 있습니까 ? 방법론 , 경계 및 / 또는 보고 연도 정의 변경에 대한 세부 정보 해당 사항 모두 선택 예 , 방법론 변경 예 , 경계 변경 예 , 보고 연도 정의 변경 아니요 , 하지만 이전 답변에서 중대한 오류가 발견됨 아니요 최대 2,500 자 작성 modified guidance added guidance for organizations with significant land sector activities in their operations or value chain and/or that choose to account for and report co2 removals. 7.1.2.1 change(s) in methodology, boundary, and/or reporting year definition? multi_select yes, a change in methodology yes, a change in boundary yes, a change in reporting year definition no, but we have discovered significant errors in our previous response(s) no 7.1.2.2 details of methodology, boundary, and/or reporting year definition change(s) rich_text change from last year modified guidance question dependencies this question only appears if you select "no" in response to 7.1. requested content change(s) in methodology, boundary, and/or reporting year definition? (column 1) select all change(s) that occurred in the reporting year. if none of the changes occurred in the reporting year, select "no". further details on each of the options are provided below: change in methodology: this refers to changes that occurred due to modifications in the way that the emissions inventory is calculated, e.g., changes in emissions factors used or changes in methodology protocol followed. change in ... 보고 연도에 배출량 회계 방법론 , 경계 및 / 또는 보고 연도 정의가 변경되었습니까 ? questions.questionText: Have your organization's base year emissions and past years' emissions been recalculated as a result of any changes or errors reported in 7.1.1 and/or 7.1.2?
questions.questionKo: 7.1.1 및/또는 7.1.2 문항에서 보고한 변경 사항이나 오류로 인해 조직의 기준연도 배출량과 과거연도 배출량을 재산정했습니까?
questions.searchText: 7.1.3 have your organization's base year emissions and past years' emissions been recalculated as a result of any changes or errors reported in 7.1.1 and/or 7.1.2? environmental performance - climate change matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 7.1.1 및/또는 7.1.2 문항에서 보고한 변경 사항이나 오류로 인해 조직의 기준연도 배출량과 과거연도 배출량을 재산정했습니까? modified question new column added 7.1.3.1 base year recalculation single_select yes no, because we have not evaluated whether the changes should trigger a base year recalculation no, because the impact does not meet our significance threshold no, because the operations acquired or divested did not exist in the base year no, because we do not have the data yet and plan to recalculate next year 7.1.3.2 scopes recalculated multi_select scope 1 scope 2, location-based scope 2, market-based scope 3 7.1.3.3 scope 3 categories recalculated multi_select purchased goods and services capital goods fuel and energy-related activities (not included in scope 1or 2) upstream transportation and distribution waste generated in operations business travel employee commuting upstream leased assets downstream transportation and distribution processing of sold products use of sold products end of life treatment of sold products downstream leased assets franchises investments other (upstream) other (downstream) 7.1.3.4 base year emissions recalculation policy, including significance threshold rich_text 7.1.3.5 past years' recalculation single_select yes no change from last year modified question question dependencies this question only appears if any of the "yes" options are selected in 7.1.1, or if any of the "yes" options or "no, but we have discovered significant errors in our previous response" is selected in response to 7.1.2. requested content general the ghg protocol corporate standard states that you should recalculate your base year emissions if your organization has changed structurally through acquisitions and/or divestments, the methodology or boundary used to calculate your emissions has changed, you have found significant errors in previous calculations, or if there have been changes to your excluded sources. this is so that your base year emissions can be directly compared with your current/reporting year emissions. a comp... ambition companies recalculate base year emissions, and emissions from previous years to reflect changes that would otherwise compromise the consistency and relevance of the reported ghg emissions information. explanation of terms significance threshold: as noted on page 35 of the ghg protocol corporate standard , a significance threshold is a "qualitative and/or quantitative criterion used to define any significant change to the data, inventory boundary, methods, or any other relevant factors. it is the responsibility of the company to determine the significance threshold that triggers base year emissions recalculation and to disclose it." 7.1.1 및 / 또는 7.1.2 에서 보고된 변경 사항이나 오류로 인해 조직의 기준 연도 배출량과 지난 해 배출량이 다시 계산되었습니까 ? 환경 성과 - 기후변화 표 형식 응답 climate questions.questionText: Select the name of the standard, protocol, or methodology you have used to collect activity data and calculate emissions.
questions.questionKo: Scope 1 & 2 & 3 배출량 데이터를 수집 및 산정에 이용한 기준, 프로토콜, 방법론의 명칭을 입력하십시오.
questions.searchText: 7.2 select the name of the standard, protocol, or methodology you have used to collect activity data and calculate emissions. environmental performance - climate change multi_select financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction scope 1 & 2 & 3 배출량 데이터를 수집 및 산정에 이용한 기준, 프로토콜, 방법론의 명칭을 입력하십시오. minor change added dropdown options "(korea) guidelines for reporting and certification of emissions in the greenhouse gas emissions trading scheme" and "the greenhouse gas protocol: land sector and removals guidance". change from last year minor change requested content general there are a variety of standards, methodologies, and protocols available for collecting and reporting ghg data, but the large majority of companies refer to the ghg protocol. the appropriateness of an emissions calculation methodology should be determined on a case-by-case basis, and it is good practice for the methods used to estimate emissions and the underlying data to be externally verified. cdp makes no judgments on standards, protocols or methodologies applied by companies to pr... 활동 데이터를 수집하고 배출량을 계산하는 데 사용한 표준 , 프로토콜 또는 방법론의 이름을 선택하십시오 . ` 환경 성과 - questions.questionText: Describe your organization's approach to reporting Scope 2 emissions.
questions.questionKo: 귀사가 Scope 2 배출량 보고에 적용한 접근법을 설명하십시오.
questions.reviewStatus: 변경 없음 확인 및 2026 원문 반영
questions.searchText: 7.3 describe your organization's approach to reporting scope 2 emissions. environmental performance - climate change matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction scope 2 배출량 보고에 대한 조직의 접근 방식을 설명하십시오 . m7. environmental performance - climate change no change - 2026 source verified 7.3.1 ​scope 2, location-based​ single_select we are reporting a scope 2, location-based figure we are not reporting a scope 2, location-based figure 7.3.2 scope 2, market-based single_select we are reporting a scope 2, market-based figure we have no operations where we are able to access electricity supplier emission factors or residual emissions factors and are unable to report a scope 2, market-based figure we have operations where we are able to access electricity supplier emission factors or residual emissions factors, but are unable to report a scope 2, market-based figure 7.3.3 comment rich_text change from last year no change requested content general your selection in the "scope 2, market-based" column determines whether you see columns, rows and/or dropdowns related to the market-based method in following questions. the ghg protocol scope 2 guidance was published in january 2015. part of the requirements of the guidance is that companies shall account for their scope 2 emissions using two methodologies: a location-based method and a market-based method. the market-based method is for those companies who have any operations in mar... scope 2 배출량 보고에 대한 조직의 접근 방식을 설명하십시오 . 환경 성과 - questions.questionText: Are there any sources (e.g. facilities, specific GHGs, activities, geographies, etc.) of Scope 1, Scope 2 or Scope 3 emissions that are excluded from your disclosure of climate-related data?
questions.questionKo: 귀사가 선택한 보고경계 안에서 공개에 포함하지 않은 Scope 1, Scope 2 또는 Scope 3 배출원(예: 설비, 특정 온실가스, 활동, 지역 등)이 있습니까?
questions.searchText: 7.4 are there any sources (e.g. facilities, specific ghgs, activities, geographies, etc.) of scope 1, scope 2 or scope 3 emissions that are excluded from your disclosure of climate-related data? environmental performance - climate change single_select financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 선택한 보고 경계 내에 있지만 공개에 포함되지 않은 scope 1, scope 2 또는 scope 3 배출원 ( 예 : 시설 , 특정 온실가스 , 활동 , 지역 등 ) 이 있습니까 ? ` m7. environmental performance - climate change 예 아니오 minor change change to question text from "are there any sources (e.g. facilities, specific ghgs, activities, geographies, etc.) of scope 1, scope 2 or scope 3 emissions that are within your selected reporting boundary which are not included in your disclosure?" to "are there any sources (e.g. facilities, specific ghgs, activities, geographies, etc.) of scope 1, scope 2 or scope 3 emissions that are excluded from your disclosure of climate-related data?" change from last year minor change requested content general identify sources that would normally be within the boundary determined by the consolidation approach that you have chosen for your disclosure in 6.1 (i.e. financial control, operational control, equity share or other) but for which greenhouse gases are not reported in this disclosure. excluded sources may be in a particular country/area or represent a number of very small facilities making it difficult to gather data. common reasons for exclusions, both relevant or not relevant, can i... ambition companies report emissions from all sources, and are transparent on all exclusions. 선택한 보고 경계 내에 있지만 공개에 포함되지 않은 scope 1, scope 2 또는 scope 3 배출원 ( 예 : 시설 , 특정 온실가스 , 활동 , 지역 등 ) 이 있습니까 ? questions.searchText: 7.5 provide your base year and base year emissions. environmental performance - climate change matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 기준 연도 및 기준 연도 배출량을 입력하십시오 . ` m7. environmental performance - climate change scope 기준연도 기준연도 배출량 방법론 상세 별도 행으로 scope 마다 작성 scope 1 scope 2 scope 3 c1~c15 카테고리별로 작성 dd/mm/yyyy 숫자 입력 소수점 이하 최대 3 자리 사용 최대 2,500 자 작성 no change - 2026 source verified 7.5.1 base year end date 7.5.2 base year emissions (metric tons co2e) numeric 7.5.3 methodological details rich_text change from last year no change requested content general this question requests a base year for your greenhouse gas inventory. this may be the same as the base year for your targets, but not necessarily. if your company has measured its emissions in the past, you can use the oldest year for which it has available emissions information - preferably verified or assured - as your base year. if your company is measuring its emissions for the first time, choose the current reporting year as the base year. companies should ensure that the base ye... additional information setting a base year: setting a base year is an essential ghg accounting step that a company must take to be able to observe trends in its emissions information. according to the ghg protocol corporate standard, a base year is "a historic datum (a specific year or an average over multiple years) against which a company's emissions are tracked over time." see chapter 5 of the ghg protocol corporate standard for more information on setting and recalculating a base year. recalculation criteria fo... ambition companies disclose that their scope 1 emissions in the reporting year have reduced in line with a 1.5 °c-aligned pathway. 기준 연도 및 기준 연도 배출량을 입력하십시오 . ` 환경 성과 - questions.questionText: What were your organization's gross global Scope 1 emissions in metric tons CO2e?
questions.questionKo: 귀사의 글로벌 총 Scope 1 배출량(metric tons CO2e)을 입력하십시오.
questions.reviewStatus: 변경 없음 확인 및 2026 원문 반영
questions.searchText: 7.6 what were your organization's gross global scope 1 emissions in metric tons co2e? environmental performance - climate change matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 귀사의 글로벌 scope 1 총 배출량 ( 미터톤 co2e) 은 얼마입니까 ? ` m7. environmental performance - climate change 연도 총 scope 1 배출량 ( 미터톤 co2e) 종료 일자 방법론 상세 별도 행으로 작성 보고연도 과거 연도 1 [m1.4 응답 결과에 따라 생성 ] 과거 연도 2 과거 연도 3 숫자 입력 소수점 이하 최대 3 자리 사용 dd/mm/yyyy 최대 2,500 자 작성 no change - 2026 source verified 7.6.1 gross global scope 1 emissions (metric tons co2e) numeric 7.6.2 end date date 7.6.3 methodological details rich_text change from last year no change requested content general emissions must be reported in gross, not net figures. therefore, negative numbers are not allowed. putting in zero suggests that you have measured your emissions and that they are equal to zero. rows in this question are presented depending on your selection in column 4 "number of past reporting years you will be providing scope 1 emissions data for" of question 1.4. gross emissions are requested so that data users can account for ghg emissions from sources owned or controlled by your... ambition organizations disclose that their scope 1 emissions in the reporting year have reduced in line with a 1.5 °c-aligned pathway. explanation of terms biogas: a gas derived principally from the anaerobic fermentation of biomass and solid wastes and combusted to produce heat and/or power. included in this category are landfill gas and sludge gas (sewage gas and gas from animal slurries) and other biogas. 귀사의 글로벌 scope 1 총 배출량 ( 미터톤 co2e) 은 얼마입니까 ? ` 환경 성과 - 2026 source verified 7.7.1 gross global scope 2, location-based emissions (metric tons co2e) numeric 7.7.2 gross global scope 2, market-based emissions (metric tons co2e) numeric 7.7.3 end date date 7.7.4 methodological details rich_text change from last year no change requested content general negative numbers are not allowed as reporting needs to be gross, not net figures. if you answered in 7.3 that you are not reporting a scope 2 location-based figure please leave the corresponding column blank. the "gross global scope 2, market-based emissions (metric tons co2e)" column only appears if you select "we are reporting a scope 2, market-based figure" in column "scope 2, market-based" of 7.3. putting in zero would suggest that you have measured your emissions and that they ar... additional information scope 2 emissions: in many industries, indirect ghg emissions mostly occur from the generation of purchased electricity (and purchased heat, steam and cooling) consumed by the company, as per the ghg protocol corporate standard. non-energy-intensive companies are likely to have significantly higher scope 2 figures than scope 1 figures. the ghg protocol highlights that "accounting for scope 2 emissions allows companies to assess the risks and opportunities associated with changing electricity ... ambition organizations disclose that their scope 2 emissions in the reporting year have reduced in line with a 1.5 °c-aligned pathway. explanation of terms electricity: in line with ghg protocol, this term is used as shorthand for electricity, steam, and heating/cooling. purchased electricity is defined as electricity that is purchased or otherwise brought into the organizational boundary of the company. scope 2 emissions physically occur at the facility where electricity is generated. 귀사의 글로벌 scope 2 총 배출량 ( 미터톤 co2e) 은 얼마입니까 ? ` 환경 성과 - questions.questionText: Account for your organization's gross global Scope 3 emissions, disclosing and explaining any exclusions.
questions.questionKo: 귀사의 글로벌 총 Scope 3 배출량 및 관련 정보를 입력하십시오. 산정에서 제외한 배출원이 있다면 이유를 입력하십시오.
questions.searchText: 7.8 account for your organization's gross global scope 3 emissions, disclosing and explaining any exclusions. environmental performance - climate change matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 귀사의 글로벌 scope 3 총 배출량을 계산하여 예외 사항을 공개하고 설명하십시오 . m7. environmental performance - climate change modified question dropdown option "average data method" will now appear for row "employee commuting" and option "average spend based method" will no longer appear for the same row. new column added and additional guidance added clarifying reporting of category 15 "investments". guidance on 'not relevant, explained' integrated into column "reason for this cateogry not being relevant" 7.8.1 evaluation status single_select relevant, calculated relevant, not yet calculated not relevant, calculated not relevant, explanation provided not evaluated 7.8.2 emissions in reporting year (metric tons co2e) numeric 7.8.3 emissions calculation methodology multi_select asset-specific method average data method average product method average spend-based method distance-based method franchise-specific method fuel-based method hybrid method investment-specific method lessor-specific method site-specific method spend-based method supplier-specific method waste-type-specific method methodology for direct use phase emissions, please specify methodology for indirect use phase emissions, please specify other, please specify 7.8.4 percentage of emissions calculated using data obtained from suppliers or value chain partners numeric 7.8.5 reason for this category not being relevant single_select not applicable to our organization's activities emissions covered under scope 1 or 2 emissions covered under another scope 3 category, please specify emissions not relevant to the sector that our organization operates in according to methodology specified in question 7.2 emissions are from intermediary products where end-use is unknown emissions estimated to be insignificant other, please specify 7.8.6 please explain rich_text change from last year modified question requested content general according to the ghg protocol's corporate value chain (scope 3) accounting and reporting standard (page 107): " any estimates of avoided emissions must be reported separately from a company's scope 1, scope 2, and scope 3 emissions, rather than included or deducted from the scope 3 inventory ". in the context of your cdp response, you can provide information on actions you take to reduce your scope 3 emissions in question 7.55.2 on emissions reduction initiatives. you should complete ... additional information relevance criteria for scope 3 emissions sources: companies should not exclude any activity that would compromise the relevance of the reported inventory. the corporate value chain (scope 3) accounting and reporting standard provides a list of criteria for determining relevance (table 6.1, p.61). companies in one of cdp's high-impact sectors should also refer to cdp's technical note on the relevance of scope 3 categories by sector , which identifies the relevant and most significant scope 3 c... example response example response example response for the selection of "relevant, calculated" in column 2. scope 3 category evaluation status emissions in reporting year (metric tons co2e) emissions calculation methodology percentage of emissions calculated using data obtained from suppliers or value chain partners reason for this category not being relevant please explain downstream transportation and distribution relevant, calculated 486,000 distance-based method 80 n/a to calculate upstream product transp... explanation of terms well-to-wheel (wtw) : a well-to-wheel analysis considers both the emissions from the vehicle itself, but also the emissions from the process of extracting the fuel used to power the vehicle's engine. it can be subdivided into the well-to-tank (wtt) (energy provision) analysis and the tank-to-wheel (ttw) (vehicle efficiency) analysis. compared to a full emissions life cycle assessment (lca), the production, maintenance, and disposal of the vehicle are not assessed. 귀사의 글로벌 scope 3 총 배출량을 계산하여 예외 사항을 공개하고 설명하십시오 . 환경 성과 - 기후변화 표 형식 응답 climate change 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 oem - epm, 화학, 금속 및 questions.questionText: Indicate the verification/assurance status that applies to your reported emissions.
questions.questionKo: 귀사가 보고한 배출량에 대한 검증/보증 여부를 입력하십시오.
questions.reviewStatus: 변경 없음 확인 및 2026 원문 반영
questions.searchText: 7.9 indicate the verification/assurance status that applies to your reported emissions. environmental performance - climate change matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 보고된 배출량에 적용되는 검증 / 보증 상태를 표시하십시오 . ` m7. environmental performance - climate change scope 검증 / 보증 상태 scope 별로 작성 scope 1 scope 2( 위치 기반 혹은 시장 기반 ) scope 3 배출량 데이터 미제공 제 3 자 검증 또는 보증 없음 제 3 자 검증 또는 보증 진행되고 있음 no change - 2026 source verified 7.9.1 verification/assurance status single_select no emissions data provided no third-party verification or assurance third-party verification or assurance process in place change from last year no change requested content general please provide the verification/assurance status that applies to your scope 1, scope 2, and scope 3 emissions. if you have had a proportion of your scope 1, 2, and/or 3 emissions verified, please select the option that applies to these emissions. if you are responding to the full version of the questionnaire, you will be given an opportunity to provide further details in the following questions. if verification/assurance is underway, or part of a biennial or triennial process: it is r... additional information annual, biennial and triennial processes: if in the year the verification is completed (for example, year 3), the data for all sources during the full cycle is verified (for example year 1, 2, and 3) the company can report 100% verification and should attach the verification statements that cover the emissions for all three years. this would be considered a triennial process . annual processes : not all processes taking place over three years will be considered a triennial process. another ex... 보고된 배출량에 적용되는 검증 / 보증 상태를 표시하십시오 . ` 환경 성과 - questions.questionText: How do your gross global emissions (Scope 1 and 2 combined) for the reporting year compare to those of the previous reporting year?
questions.questionKo: 귀사의 보고연도의 글로벌 총 배출량(Scope 1과 Scope 2를 합산한 총량)은 지난해 배출량과 차이가 있습니까?
questions.reviewStatus: 변경 없음 확인 및 2026 원문 반영
questions.searchText: 7.10 how do your gross global emissions (scope 1 and 2 combined) for the reporting year compare to those of the previous reporting year? environmental performance - climate change single_select financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 보고 연도의 전 세계 총 배출량 (scope 1 과 2 를 합친 수치 ) 은 이전 보고 연도의 배출량에 비해 어떻게 변화했습니까 ? ` m7. environmental performance - climate change 증가 감소 전반적으로 동일함 올해는 보고 첫 해이므로 작년과 비교할 수 없음 배출량 데이터가 없음 no change - 2026 source verified change from last year no change requested content general this question requires you to select the option from the drop-down menu that best describes how your combined scope 1 and 2 emissions have changed compared with the previous year. the change in emissions can be calculated using the following formula: total gross scope 1+2 emissions for the current reporting year - previous year's total gross scope 1+2 emissions = total change in emissions if the resulting figure is negative, then your company's overall emissions decreased compared to ... 보고 연도의 전 세계 총 배출량 (scope 1 과 2 를 합친 수치 ) 은 이전 보고 연도의 배출량에 비해 어떻게 변화했습니까 ? questions.questionText: Identify the reasons for any change in your gross global emissions (Scope 1 and 2 combined), and for each of them specify how your emissions compare to the previous year.
questions.questionKo: 글로벌 총 배출량(Scope 1과 Scope 2를 합산한 총량)의 변화의 원인을 명시하고, 각 원인별 배출량의 변화를 지난해와 비교하여 입력하십시오.
questions.searchText: 7.10.1 identify the reasons for any change in your gross global emissions (scope 1 and 2 combined), and for each of them specify how your emissions compare to the previous year. environmental performance - climate change matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 총 배출량 (scope 1 과 2 합산 ) 에 변화가 있는 경우 그 이유를 파악하고 , 각각에 대해 배출량이 전년도와 어떻게 비교되는지 구체적으로 설명하십시오 . ` m7. environmental performance - climate change 이유 배출량 변화 ( 미터톤 co2e) 배출량 변화 방향 배출량 변화율 ( 백분율 ) 계산식 설명 각 행별로 작성 재생 에너지 소비량 변화 기타 배출량 감축 활동 매각 인수 합병 생산량 변화 방법론의 변화 경계 변경 물리적 운영 조건의 변화 미확인 기타 숫자 입력 소수점 최대 3 자리 입력 증가 감소 변화 없음 숫자 입력 소수점 최대 4 자리 입력 최대 2,400 자 작성 modified guidance added guidance for organizations with significant land sector activities in their operations or value chain and/or that choose to account for and report co2 removals. 7.10.1.1 change in emissions (metric tons co2e) numeric 7.10.1.2 direction of change in emissions single_select increased decreased no change 7.10.1.3 emissions value (percentage) numeric 7.10.1.4 please explain calculation rich_text change from last year modified guidance question dependencies this question only appears if you select "increased", "decreased" or "remained the same overall" in response to 7.10. requested content general categorize the changes that have occurred in your gross global emissions. you are asked to break down all the different factors that have influenced any overall change in scope 1+2 emissions; whether increasing or decreasing factors. break down each applicable factor, describe each in a separate row, and provide the value for the change in overall emissions that is attributed to each of the factors. even if companies have experienced no change overall or an increase in absolute emissi... example response worked example of reporting change in emissions example 1 : the gross global emissions (scope 1 + 2) of company x for this reporting year are 208 metric tons of co2e. its gross global emissions for the previous reporting year were 200 metric tons of co2e. this means that the total change in emissions is 8 metric tons of co2e, equal to a 4% increase, according to the formula in the explanation of terms, above: (8/200) * 100 = 4%. the change from 200 to 208 metric tons is attributed to two reas... 총 배출량 (scope 1 과 2 합산 ) 에 변화가 있는 경우 그 이유를 파악하고 , 각각에 대해 배출량이 전년도와 어떻게 비교되는지 구체적으로 설명하십시오 . 환경 성과 - questions.questionText: Are your emissions performance calculations in 7.10 and 7.10.1 based on a location-based Scope 2 emissions figure or a market-based Scope 2 emissions figure?
questions.questionKo: 지역기반 Scope 2 배출량과 시장기반 Scope 2 배출량 중, 귀사가 7.10 및 7.10.1에 입력한 배출량 성과 산정에 반영한 배출량 유형을 선택하십시오.

questions.searchText: 7.12 does your organization have significant land sector activities in its operations or value chain? environmental performance - climate change matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 생물성 탄소로 인한 이산화탄소 배출이 조직과 관련이 있습니까 ? ` m7. environmental performance - climate change 예 아니오 new question new question new column 7.12.1 agriculture, forestry or other land sector activities single_select yes, in our direct operations yes, in our upstream/downstream value chain yes, in both our direct operations and our upstream/downstream value chain no, explanation provided not evaluated 7.12.2 indicate if these activities are only related to forest lands and/or non-productive, non-forest lands single_select yes, these activities are only related to forest lands and/or non-productive, non-forest lands no, these activities include those related to agricultural lands 7.12.3 specify the reason for no significant activities single_select no relevant activities identified relevant activities identified but evaluated to be below the significance threshold no relevant activities related to agricultural lands identified activities related to agricultural lands identified but evaluated to be below the significance threshold 7.12.4 significance threshold rich_text change from last year new question requested content general this question allows you to indicate the relevance of land sector emissions and removals for your organization in line with the ghg protocol land sector and removals standard (lsrs) and guidance. based on selections in this question, you may be presented with 7.12.1 which allows you to report which lsrs land sector accounting subcategories are relevant, and which you calculate. however, complete reporting of emissions and removals in these categories is not yet enabled in cdp's 2026 c... explanation of terms non-productive, non-forest lands: non-forest lands outside of agricultural production ( ghg protocol ). 생물성 탄소로 인한 이산화탄소 배출이 조직과 관련이 있습니까 ? ` 환경 성과 - 기후변화 표 형식 응답 climate change 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 oem - epm, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 oem, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설 생물의 연소를 통해 발생한 이산화탄소의 배출이 있습니까? questions.questionText: Which of the following land sector accounting subcategories are relevant to your organization in the reporting year?

questions.searchText: 7.12.1 which of the following land sector accounting subcategories are relevant to your organization in the reporting year? environmental performance - climate change matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction 조직과 관련된 생물성 탄소 배출량을 미터톤 co2 단위로 입력하십시오 . ` m7. environmental performance - climate change 생물성 탄소로 인한 co2 배출량 ( 미터톤 co2) 관련 설명 숫자 입력 소수점 최대 3 자리 입력 최대 2,400 자 작성 new question new question new column 7.12.1.1 scope 1 single_select relevant, calculated relevant, not yet calculated not relevant, explanation provided not evaluated 7.12.1.2 scope 2 single_select relevant, calculated relevant, not yet calculated not relevant, explanation provided not evaluated 7.12.1.3 scope 3 single_select relevant, calculated relevant, not yet calculated not relevant, explanation provided not evaluated 7.12.1.4 please explain rich_text change from last year new question question dependencies this question only appears if you select "no, these activities include those related to agricultural lands" in response to 7.12 column "indicate if these activities are only related to forest lands and/or non-productive, non-forest lands." requested content general this question asks which of the ghg protocol land sector and removals standard (lsrs) physical ghg inventory accounting subcategories and required additional accounting subcategories for land sector value chains are relevant to your organization. the evaluation for each scope includes two components: whether an accounting subcategory is relevant to your business and whether you have calculated the data in that subcategory. relevance may be affected by your significance threshold. the ... explanation of terms biogenic product co2 emissions (as gross co2 fluxes): gross co2 emissions from combustion, biodegradation or other losses from biogenic product carbon pools to the atmosphere ( ghg protocol ). biogenic product emissions : gross ch4, n2o and, if applicable, co2 emissions from combustion, biodegradation or other losses from biogenic product carbon pools to the atmosphere ( ghg protocol ). carbon pool : a physical reservoir or medium where carbon is stored ( ghg protocol ). land carbon leakage: ... 조직과 관련된 생물성 탄소 배출량을 미터톤 co2 단위로 입력하십시오 . ` 환경 성과 - questions.questionText: Provide the emissions from biogenic carbon relevant to your organization in metric tons CO2.
questions.questionKo: the emissions from 생물기원 탄소 relevant to 귀사 in 미터톤 CO2.을/를 입력하십시오.
questions.searchText: 7.12.2 provide the emissions from biogenic carbon relevant to your organization in metric tons co2. environmental performance - climate change matrix oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, real estate, construction [국문 번역 검토 필요] provide the emissions from biogenic carbon relevant to your organization in metric tons co2. modified question conditional logic updated - this question only appears if you select "no, these activities include those related to agricultural lands" in response to 7.12 column "indicate if these activities are only related to forest lands and/or non-productive, non-forest lands." and guidance updated to reflect this. 7.12.2.1 co2 emissions from biogenic carbon (metric tons co2) numeric 7.12.2.2 comment rich_text change from last year modified question (2025 7.12.1) question dependencies this question appears if you select "yes, in our direct operations" or "yes, in both our direct operations and our upstream/downstream value chain" in response to 7.12 column "agriculture, forestry or other land sector activities". requested content general the ghg protocol has developed a new land sector and removals standard (lsrs) and guidance . due to the timeline of publication, organizations are not yet able to report emissions and removals in line with the lsrs in cdp's 2026 corporate questionnaire. however, this question allows you to report co2 emissions from biogenic carbon in alignment with the ghg protocol corporate standard . this question remains in the 2026 cdp questionnaire to maintain alignment with the ghg protocol corp... additional information biogenic materials, including biomass, biofuels, and biogas, are increasingly used as a resource for energy generation. while biomass can produce fewer ghg emissions than fossil fuels and may be grown and used on a shorter time horizon, it still produces ghg emissions and should not be treated with a "zero" emission factor. based on the ghg protocol corporate accounting and reporting standard , any emissions of ch4 or n2o from biologically sequestered carbon shall be reported in scope 1, 2 or... the emissions from biogenic carbon relevant to your organization in 미터톤 co2.을/를 입력하십시오. 환경 성과 - 기후변화 표 형식 응답 climate change 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 oem - epm, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 운송 oem, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, 부동산, 건설 the emissions from biogenic carbon relevant to your organization in 미터톤 co2.을/를 입력하십시오. 환경 성과 - questions.questionText: Does your organization choose to account for and report technological CO2 removals or captured CO2 with geologic storage, or have you done so in previous years?
questions.questionKo: 귀사는 choose to account for 및 report technological CO2 removals 또는 captured CO2 with geologic storage, 또는 have you done so in previous years입니까?
questions.searchText: 7.13 does your organization choose to account for and report technological co2 removals or captured co2 with geologic storage, or have you done so in previous years? environmental performance - climate change matrix financial services, oil & gas, coal, general, aviation, capital goods, transport oems - epm, chemicals, metals & mining, transport services, steel, agricultural commodities, transport oems, energy utilities & power generators, cement, food, beverage & tobacco, paper & forestry, real estate, construction [국문 번역 검토 필요] does your organization choose to account for and report technological co2 removals or captured co2 with geologic storage, or have you done so in previous years? new question new question new column 7.13.1 technological co2 removals or captured co2 with geologic storage in the reporting year single_select yes, in our direct operations yes, in our upstream/downstream value chain yes, in both our direct operations and our upstream/downstream value chain no, explanation provided not evaluated 7.13.2 specify the reason for no technological co2 removals or captured co2 with geological storage in the reporting year single_select no relevant activities identified relevant activities identified but chosen not to account for/report 7.13.3 technological co2 removals or captured co2 with geologic storage were accounted for and reported in previous years single_select yes no change from last year new question requested content general this question allows you to indicate the relevance of technological co2 removals or captured co2 with geologic storage for your organization in line with the ghg protocol land sector and removals standard (lsrs) and guidance . based on selections in this question, you may be presented with 7.13.1 which allows you to report which lsrs technological removals accounting subcategories are relevant, and which you calculate. however, complete reporting of emissions and removals in these cat... explanation of terms captured biogenic co2 with geologic storage: net co2 removals resulting from annual net increases to carbon stored in geologic carbon pools from carbon derived from biological sinks ( ghg protocol ). technological co2 removals with geologic storage: net co2 removals resulting from annual net increases to carbon stored in geologic carbon pools from carbon derived from technological sinks ( ghg protocol ). 귀사는 choose to account for 및 report technological co2 removals 또는 captured co2 with geologic storage, 또는 have you done so in previous years입니까? protocol ). gross co2 emissions from geologic storage: gross co2 emissions from fugitive co2 emissions or other co2 losses to the atmosphere from a geologic reservoir containing captured and stored questions.questionText: Break down your total gross global Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions by greenhouse gas type and provide the source of each used global warming potential (GWP).

as scientific understanding has developed. gwp factors are reassessed every few years in the ipcc assessment reports and accordingly, cdp recommends that companies use the latest gwps given in the ipcc's sixth assessment report (ar6) . this approach is aligned with the ghg protocol required greenhouse gases in inventories: accounting and reporting standard amendment which states that the company "shall use 1... explanation of terms global warming potential (gwp): the intergovernmental panel on climate change (ipcc)'s sixth assessment report (ar6) defines the global warming potential (gwp) as "an index measuring the radiative forcing following an emission of a unit mass of a given substance, accumulated over a chosen time horizon, relative to that of the reference substance,
